trait.name: Relay Crew
entries: If the technician uses its action to assist a creature stabilizing a portal, the remaining time needed to stabilize that portal is reduced by 1 round.

action.name: Signal Prod
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) piercing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) lightning damage.

action.name: Arc Spark
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 5} to hit, range 60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 2d6}) lightning damage.

action.name: Purge Crystal (1/Day)
entries: The technician activates a volatile crystal against one unattended object, document bundle, or console within 5 feet. The target begins burning or glassing over. A creature can use an action to stop the purge with a successful DC 13 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand), Intelligence (Arcana), or relevant tool check. If not stopped before the start of the technician's next turn, mundane documents are destroyed and a small device or console loses one recoverable clue.

bonus.name: Pack Component
entries: The technician packs or grabs one Tiny or Small relay component within 5 feet. Until the technician drops it, that component is no longer available as evidence unless the technician is stopped.
